result.preview:
"Postgres query exectution error (ProgrammingError): (psycopg2.errors.UndefinedFunction) operator does not exist: text >= date
LINE 8:   WHERE c.createddate >= p.start_dt
                              ^
HINT:  No operator matches the given name and argument types. You might need to add explicit type casts.

[SQL: WITH params AS (
  SELECT DATE '2023-04-10' AS asof,
         DATE '2022-04-01' AS start_dt
),
filtered_cases AS (
  SELECT c.id AS case_id
  FROM "Case" c, params p
  WHERE c.createddate >= p.start_dt
    AND c.createddate < p.asof
),
assignments AS (
  SELECT ch.caseid__c AS case_id,
         NULLIF(TRIM(BOTH FROM ch.oldvalue__c), '') AS old_owner,
         NULLIF(TRIM(BOTH FROM ch.newvalue__c), '') AS new_owner,
         ch.createddate
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  JOIN filtered_cases fc ON fc.case_id = ch.caseid__c
  WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner'
),
transfers AS (
  SELECT old_owner AS agent_id,
         COUNT(*)::bigint AS transfer_count
  FROM assignments
  WHERE old_owner IS NOT NULL
    AND new_owner IS NOT NULL
    AND old_owner <> new_owner
  GROUP BY old_owner
),
handled AS (
  SELECT owner_id AS agent_id, COUNT(DISTINCT case_id)::bigint AS case_count
  FROM (
    SELECT new_owner AS owner_id, case_id FROM assignments WHERE new_owner IS NOT NULL
    UNION ALL
    SELECT old_owner AS owner_id, case_id FROM assignments WHERE old_owner IS NOT NULL
  ) x
  GROUP BY owner_id
),
eligible AS (
  SELECT h.agent_id,
         h.case_count,
         COALESCE(t.transfer_count,0) AS transfer_count
  FROM handled h
  LEFT JOIN transfers t ON t.agent_id = h.agent_id
  WHERE h.case_count > 0
)
SELECT agent_id AS "Id"
FROM eligible
ORDER BY transfer_count ASC, case_count DESC, agent_id ASC
LIMIT 1;]
(Background on this error at: https://sqlalche.me/e/20/f405)"

args.query:
WITH params AS (
  SELECT DATE '2023-04-10' AS asof,
         DATE '2022-04-01' AS start_dt
),
filtered_cases AS (
  SELECT c.id AS case_id
  FROM "Case" c, params p
  WHERE c.createddate >= p.start_dt
    AND c.createddate < p.asof
),
assignments AS (
  SELECT ch.caseid__c AS case_id,
         NULLIF(TRIM(BOTH FROM ch.oldvalue__c), '') AS old_owner,
         NULLIF(TRIM(BOTH FROM ch.newvalue__c), '') AS new_owner,
         ch.createddate
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  JOIN filtered_cases fc ON fc.case_id = ch.caseid__c
  WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner'
),
transfers AS (
  SELECT old_owner AS agent_id,
         COUNT(*)::bigint AS transfer_count
  FROM assignments
  WHERE old_owner IS NOT NULL
    AND new_owner IS NOT NULL
    AND old_owner <> new_owner
  GROUP BY old_owner
),
handled AS (
  SELECT owner_id AS agent_id, COUNT(DISTINCT case_id)::bigint AS case_count
  FROM (
    SELECT new_owner AS owner_id, case_id FROM assignments WHERE new_owner IS NOT NULL
    UNION ALL
    SELECT old_owner AS owner_id, case_id FROM assignments WHERE old_owner IS NOT NULL
  ) x
  GROUP BY owner_id
),
eligible AS (
  SELECT h.agent_id,
         h.case_count,
         COALESCE(t.transfer_count,0) AS transfer_count
  FROM handled h
  LEFT JOIN transfers t ON t.agent_id = h.agent_id
  WHERE h.case_count > 0
)
SELECT agent_id AS "Id"
FROM eligible
ORDER BY transfer_count ASC, case_count DESC, agent_id ASC
LIMIT 1;

  FROM "Case" c, params p
  WHERE c.createddate >= p.start_dt

),
assignments AS (

         NULLIF(TRIM(BOTH FROM ch.oldvalue__c), '') AS old_owner,
         NULLIF(TRIM(BOTH FROM ch.newvalue__c), '') AS new_owner,

transfers AS (
  SELECT old_owner AS agent_id,
         COUNT(*)::bigint AS transfer_count
  FROM assignments
  WHERE old_owner IS NOT NULL
    AND new_owner IS NOT NULL
    AND old_owner <> new_owner
  GROUP BY old_owner
),
handled AS (
  SELECT owner_id AS agent_id, COUNT(DISTINCT case_id)::bigint AS case_count
  FROM (
    SELECT new_owner AS owner_id, case_id FROM assignments WHERE new_owner IS NOT NULL
    UNION ALL

  ) x
  GROUP BY owner_id
),
eligible AS (
  SELECT h.agent_id,
         h.case_count,

  FROM handled h
  LEFT JOIN transfers t ON t.agent_id = h.agent_id

ORDER BY transfer_count ASC, case_count DESC, agent_id ASC

WITH params AS (
  SELECT DATE '2023-04-10' AS asof,
         DATE '2022-04-01' AS start_dt
),
filtered_cases AS (
  SELECT c.id AS case_id
  FROM "Case" c, params p
  WHERE c.createddate::date >= p.start_dt
    AND c.createddate::date < p.asof
),
assignments AS (
  SELECT ch.caseid__c AS case_id,
         NULLIF(TRIM(BOTH FROM ch.oldvalue__c), '') AS old_owner,
         NULLIF(TRIM(BOTH FROM ch.newvalue__c), '') AS new_owner,
         ch.createddate
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  JOIN filtered_cases fc ON fc.case_id = ch.caseid__c
  WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner'
),
transfers AS (
  SELECT old_owner AS agent_id,
         COUNT(*)::bigint AS transfer_count
  FROM assignments
  WHERE old_owner IS NOT NULL
    AND new_owner IS NOT NULL
    AND old_owner <> new_owner
  GROUP BY old_owner
),
handled AS (
  SELECT owner_id AS agent_id, COUNT(DISTINCT case_id)::bigint AS case_count
  FROM (
    SELECT new_owner AS owner_id, case_id FROM assignments WHERE new_owner IS NOT NULL
    UNION ALL
    SELECT old_owner AS owner_id, case_id FROM assignments WHERE old_owner IS NOT NULL
  ) x
  GROUP BY owner_id
),
eligible AS (
  SELECT h.agent_id,
         h.case_count,
         COALESCE(t.transfer_count,0) AS transfer_count
  FROM handled h
  LEFT JOIN transfers t ON t.agent_id = h.agent_id
  WHERE h.case_count > 0
)
SELECT agent_id AS "Id"
FROM eligible
ORDER BY transfer_count ASC, case_count DESC, agent_id ASC
LIMIT 1;

args.query:
WITH params AS (
  SELECT DATE '2023-04-10' AS asof,
         DATE '2022-04-01' AS start_dt
),
filtered_cases AS (
  SELECT c.id AS case_id
  FROM "Case" c, params p
  WHERE c.createddate::date >= p.start_dt
    AND c.createddate::date < p.asof
),
assignments AS (
  SELECT ch.caseid__c AS case_id,
         NULLIF(TRIM(BOTH FROM ch.oldvalue__c), '') AS old_owner,
         NULLIF(TRIM(BOTH FROM ch.newvalue__c), '') AS new_owner,
         ch.createddate
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  JOIN filtered_cases fc ON fc.case_id = ch.caseid__c
  WHERE LOWER(ch.field__c) = 'ownerid'
),
transfers AS (
  SELECT old_owner AS agent_id,
         COUNT(*)::bigint AS transfer_count
  FROM assignments
  WHERE old_owner IS NOT NULL
    AND new_owner IS NOT NULL
    AND old_owner <> new_owner
  GROUP BY old_owner
),
handled AS (
  SELECT owner_id AS agent_id, COUNT(DISTINCT case_id)::bigint AS case_count
  FROM (
    SELECT new_owner AS owner_id, case_id FROM assignments WHERE new_owner IS NOT NULL
    UNION ALL
    SELECT old_owner AS owner_id, case_id FROM assignments WHERE old_owner IS NOT NULL
  ) x
  GROUP BY owner_id
),
eligible AS (
  SELECT h.agent_id,
         h.case_count,
         COALESCE(t.transfer_count,0) AS transfer_count
  FROM handled h
  LEFT JOIN transfers t ON t.agent_id = h.agent_id
  WHERE h.case_count > 0
)
SELECT agent_id AS "Id"
FROM eligible
ORDER BY transfer_count ASC, case_count DESC, agent_id ASC
LIMIT 1;

args.query:
SELECT field__c, COUNT(*) AS cnt
FROM casehistory__c
GROUP BY field__c
ORDER BY cnt DESC
LIMIT 20;

args.query:
WITH params AS (
  SELECT DATE '2023-04-10' AS asof,
         DATE '2022-04-01' AS start_dt
),
filtered_cases AS (
  SELECT c.id AS case_id
  FROM "Case" c, params p

),
assignments AS (

         NULLIF(TRIM(BOTH FROM ch.oldvalue__c), '') AS old_owner,
         NULLIF(TRIM(BOTH FROM ch.newvalue__c), '') AS new_owner,
         ch.createddate
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  JOIN filtered_cases fc ON fc.case_id = ch.caseid__c
  WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner Assignment'
),
transfers AS (
  SELECT old_owner AS agent_id,
         COUNT(*)::bigint AS transfer_count
  FROM assignments
  WHERE old_owner IS NOT NULL
    AND new_owner IS NOT NULL
    AND old_owner <> new_owner

handled AS (
  SELECT owner_id AS agent_id, COUNT(DISTINCT case_id)::bigint AS case_count

  GROUP BY owner_id

eligible AS (
  SELECT h.agent_id,
         h.case_count,
         COALESCE(t.transfer_count,0) AS transfer_count
  FROM handled h
  LEFT JOIN transfers t ON t.agent_id = h.agent_id
  WHERE h.case_count > 0

FROM eligible
ORDER BY transfer_count ASC, case_count DESC, agent_id ASC
